query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Horizontal streaks of green, teal, blue, and warm accents of peach, yellow, and soft pink ripple across the frame in layered, overlapping bands. Broad white bands slice through the midsection, while angular geometric fragments interweave with smooth gradient flows, suggesting foliage or reflected light in motion.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Horizontal streaks of green, teal, blue, and warm accents of peach, yellow, and soft pink ripple across the frame in layered, overlapping bands, heavily blurred through motion or soft focus so that all forms dissolve into indistinct streaks and geometric smears. Broad white bands slice through the midsection, while angular fragments interweave with smooth gradient flows, creating an abstract composition where no recognizable subject emerges and fine detail is entirely absent, leaving only color, gesture, and the impression of speed.
